query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN emailVerified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN emailVerificationCode VARCHAR(10),
ADD COLUMN emailVerificationExpires TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN passwordResetCode VARCHAR(10),
ADD COLUMN passwordResetExpires TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN trialExpirationNotified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
